interactions.evidence_summary: DailyMed labeling references and the MedCombo demo rule mark this ingredient pair as review-worthy for pharmacist or clinician review.
interactions.plain_language_explanation: Warfarin and ibuprofen may raise bleeding-related concerns when used together. A pharmacist or clinician should review the combination before any medication changes.
interactions.professional_question: Can you review whether warfarin and ibuprofen are appropriate together for me, and whether another pain-relief option would be better?
